body:
Seems that when I use this mod along side [Villager Trading Plus mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/trading+) the functionality of this mod overwrites the second mod functionality on click.

For demonstration, having both mods active, setting Villager Trading Plus to trade all on click, then if I have a trade as favorite from this mod, on click it does the vanilla behavior for trade where it should do trade all for the trade clicked like it does when I do have only Villager Trading Plus mod installed.

Available for further details if need.
title: Conflict with Villager Trading Plus mod
